_comment: Config-driven local pipeline runner. Add/change entries here to control how each activity type is executed locally without modifying runner source code.

Wait.description: Waits for the specified duration (in seconds)

Fail.description: Fails the pipeline with a custom message and error code

SetVariable.description: Sets a pipeline variable to the evaluated value

AppendVariable.description: Appends a value to an array pipeline variable

Filter.description: Evaluates each item in the input array against the condition expression

ForEach.description: Iterates over each item in the evaluated items expression and runs child activities

Until.description: Repeats child activities until the expression evaluates to true, or the timeout is reached

IfCondition.description: Branches to the true or false activity set based on the evaluated boolean expression

Switch.description: Branches to the matching case (or default) based on the evaluated on-expression

ExecutePipeline.description: Resolves and executes another pipeline in this workspace with the given parameters

WebActivity.description: Makes an HTTP call using the developer's local network and identity (no MSI)

SynapseNotebook.notSupportedReason: SynapseNotebook requires a live Synapse Spark pool connection. Not supported in local run mode.

SparkJob.notSupportedReason: SparkJob requires a live Synapse Spark pool connection. Not supported in local run mode.

Script.notSupportedReason: Script requires a live SQL serverless/dedicated pool connection. Not supported in local run mode.

SqlServerStoredProcedure.notSupportedReason: SqlServerStoredProcedure requires a live SQL server connection. Not supported in local run mode.

Copy.notSupportedReason: Copy requires live source and sink connections. Not supported in local run mode.

Lookup.notSupportedReason: Lookup requires a live data source connection. Not supported in local run mode.

Delete.notSupportedReason: Delete requires a live data source connection. Not supported in local run mode.

GetMetadata.notSupportedReason: GetMetadata requires a live data source connection. Not supported in local run mode.

Validation.notSupportedReason: Validation requires a live storage connection. Not supported in local run mode.
